title: Rope Rig — Physics Playground
description: Build ropes, ragdolls & rope bridges with Verlet physics — cut, pin, and stress-test until something snaps.
concept: A Verlet-integration physics sandbox with three build modes: draw hanging ropes, drop jointed ragdolls, and span plank bridges between two points. Every link is colored by tension and snaps if overstretched, so dropping weight balls on a bridge or a ragdoll makes it visibly sag, creak, and break.
features: 3 build modes — rope, ragdoll, bridge — plus weight, pin, and cut tools
stress-colored links (green→red) that physically snap past a break threshold
cut tool severs any rope or plank mid-air with a drag gesture
pin/unpin any point to anchor or release it live
gravity and gusting wind sliders reshape the whole scene in real time
JSON export/import, shareable URL-hash link, and PNG screenshot export

interaction.mouse: Drag to draw ropes or move points; click to spawn ragdolls, weights, or set bridge anchors
interaction.click: Tap a point in Pin mode to anchor/release it; tap mode buttons to switch tools
interaction.touch: Same gestures via touch — drag, tap, and drag-cut all work on mobile
